name: Section: audience
visual: Who-we-serve cards: an icon or mono index label, a segment title, one line. Either deep industry pages or 3 persona cards.
placement: Mid-page (slot 6). Centered header + 3-col card grid; or a rotating persona carousel.
animation: Cards stagger-reveal; persona carousel auto-advances with cross-fade/slide (~5s) and arrow control.
realWorld: Nexova: 12 industry verticals (Startups, IT, Medical, NGOs, …)

designLanguage.warm: A/B/C cards with hairlines on paper.
